bank.retain_mission: Extract roadmap decisions, prioritization rationale, sprint outcomes, behavioral-experiment results, and the framework used to balance bets.
bank.observations_mission: Observations are stable facts about the team's prioritization framework, north-star metric, sprint cadence, and the patterns of experiments that consistently win or fail. Ignore one-off backlog churn.

mental_models.name: Prioritization Framework
mental_models.source_query: How does the team prioritize? Include the framework (RICE, Kano, etc.), north-star metric, and bets currently in flight.

mental_models.name: Experiment Learnings
mental_models.source_query: What sprint and behavioral experiments have we run, and what patterns emerge about what works? Include winning nudges and failed bets with numbers.
